import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ans = df_titanic.with_columns(
    AgeCategory=pl.when(pl.col("Age") < 12)
    .then(pl.lit("Child"))
    .when(pl.col("Age") < 60)
    .then(pl.lit("Adult"))
    .when(pl.col("Age") >= 60)
    .then(pl.lit("Senior"))
    .otherwise(None)
)
print(ans)

)

fields.problem:
`_df`ÒéÆµ¼íÒü«µØíõ╗ÂÒüºõ┐«µ¡úÒüùprintÒüºÕç║ÕèøÒüùÒüªÒüÅÒüáÒüòÒüäÒÇé
* 1Õêùþø«Òü¿2Õêùþø«Òü»ÒÇüÕêù`Station`Òü¿Õêù`DATE`Òü¿ÒüÖÒéï
* Õ£░þé╣(Station)ÒüöÒü¿ÒÇüÒüïÒüñ10Õ╣┤ÒüöÒü¿Òü½Õ╣│ÕØçµ£ÇÚ½ÿµ░ùµ©®´╝êTMAXÒü«Õ╣│ÕØç´╝ëÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ùÒüÖÒéï
  * 3Õêùþø«Òü«ÕêùÕÉìÒéÆ`AvgTMAX/decade`Òü¿ÒüÖÒéï
õ╗Ñõ©ïÒü«Òé│Òâ╝ÒâëÒéÆÕ«îµêÉÒüùÒÇüÕ«îµêÉÒüùÒüƒÒé│Òâ╝ÒâëÕà¿õ¢ôÒü«Òü┐ÒéÆÕø×þ¡öÒüùÒüªÒüÅÒüáÒüòÒüäÒÇé
```python
import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
# ÒâÇÒâƒÒâ╝Òü«Þª│µ©¼Õ£░þé╣ÕêùÒéÆÞ┐¢Õèá
_df = df_weather.with_columns(
    Station=pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() < 1950)
    .then(pl.lit("StationA"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("StationB"))
)
```
fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
# ÒâÇÒâƒÒâ╝Òü«Þª│µ©¼Õ£░þé╣ÕêùÒéÆÞ┐¢Õèá
_df = df_weather.with_columns(
    Station=pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() < 1950)
    .then(pl.lit("StationA"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("StationB"))
)
ans = _df.group_by_dynamic(
    index_column="DATE",
    every="10y",  # 10Õ╣┤ÒüöÒü¿Òü½ÚøåÞ¿ê
    group_by="Station",  # Òé½ÒâåÒé┤Òâ¬Òé½Òâ½Òé¡Òâ╝ÒéÆµîçÕ«Ü
).agg(pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("AvgTMAX/decade"))
print(ans)

import polars as pl

* ÕÉäÕ«óÕ«ñÒé»Òâ®Òé╣ (Pclass) ÕåàÒüºÒÇüÚüïÞ│âÒüî50õ╗Ñõ©èÒü«õ╣ùÕ«óÒü«Òü┐ÒéÆÕ»¥Þ▒íÒü½ÒÇüÚüïÞ│âÒü«þ┤»þ®ìÕÆîÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ùÒüÖÒéï
  * ÚüïÞ│âÒüî50µ£¬µ║ÇÒü«õ╣ùÕ«óÒü»ÚüïÞ│âÒéÆ0Òü¿Òü┐Òü¬ÒüÖ
  * ÕêùÕÉìÒéÆ`ConditionalCumulativeFare`Òü¿ÒüÖÒéï
õ╗Ñõ©ïÒü«Òé│Òâ╝ÒâëÒéÆÕ«îµêÉÒüùÒÇüÕ«îµêÉÒüùÒüƒÒé│Òâ╝ÒâëÕà¿õ¢ôÒü«Òü┐ÒéÆÕø×þ¡öÒüùÒüªÒüÅÒüáÒüòÒüäÒÇé
```python
import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
```
fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ans = df_titanic.with_columns(
    ConditionalCumulativeFare=pl.when(pl.col("Fare") >= 50)
    .then(pl.col("Fare"))
    .otherwise(0)
    .cum_sum()
    .over("Pclass")
)
print(ans)

```python
import polars as pl
df_json = pl.DataFrame(
    {
        "OrderID": [101, 102, 103],
        "ItemJson": [
            '{"name": "Laptop", "price": 1200}',
            '{"name": "Mouse", "price": 25}',
            '{"name": "Keyboard", "price": 75}',
        ],
    }
)
dtype = pl.Struct([
    pl.Field("name", pl.String),
    pl.Field("price", pl.Int64),
])

    ItemStruct=pl.col("ItemJson").str.json_decode(dtype),
)
```

1. Õêù`DATE`ÒéÆdateÕ×ïÒü½Õñëµø┤ÒüÖÒéï
2. µ£êÒüöÒü¿Òü½ÒÇüµùÑµ¼íÒü«µ£ÇÚ½ÿµ░ùµ©®(TMAX)Òü«Õ╣│ÕØç(MonthlyAvgTMAX)Òü¿µ¿Öµ║ûÕüÅÕÀ«(MonthlyStdTMAX)ÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ùÒüÖÒéï

µ£ÇÕêØÒü«3ÞíîÒüîõ©ïÞ¿ÿÒü«ÒéêÒüåÒü½Òü¬ÒéïÒüôÒü¿ÒÇé

õ╗Ñõ©ïÒü«Òé│Òâ╝ÒâëÒéÆÕ«îµêÉÒüùÒÇüÕ«îµêÉÒüùÒüƒÒé│Òâ╝ÒâëÕà¿õ¢ôÒü«Òü┐ÒéÆÕø×þ¡öÒüùÒüªÒüÅÒüáÒüòÒüäÒÇé

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)
# 1. Õêù`DATE`ÒéÆdateÕ×ïÒü½Õñëµø┤
_tmp = _df.with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

# 2. µ£êÒüöÒü¿Òü«µ£ÇÚ½ÿµ░ùµ©®(TMAX)Òü«Õ╣│ÕØçÒü¿µ¿Öµ║ûÕüÅÕÀ«Òü«Þ¿êþ«ù
_tmp = _tmp.with_columns(
    MonthlyAvgTMAX=pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()),
    MonthlyStdTMAX=pl.col("TMAX").std().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()),
)

# 3. µ£ÇÚ½ÿµ░ùµ©®Òüîµ£êÕ╣│ÕØçÒüïÒéëµ¿Öµ║ûÕüÅÕÀ«Òü«2ÕÇìõ╗Ñõ©èÒéÆþò░Õ©©µùÑ
_tmp = _tmp.with_columns(
    IsAnomaly=(pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() > 2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
)

# 4. þò░Õ©©µùÑÒü«ÒéÆµè¢Õç║ÒüùÒüªÒé¢Òâ╝Òâê
print(_tmp.filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly")).sort("DATE").collect())

**µëïÚáå**

1. ÒâçÒâ╝Òé┐Òé»Òâ¬Òâ╝ÒâïÒâ│Òé░
  * InvoiceDateÒéÆdatetimeÕ×ïÒü½ÕñëµÅø(`format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M"`)
  * Quantity > 0ÒÇüUnitPrice > 0ÒÇüCustomerIDÒüîµ¼áµÉìõ╗ÑÕñûÒüºÒâòÒéúÒâ½Òé┐Òâ¬Òâ│Òé░

2. RFMµîçµ¿ÖÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ù
  * CustomerIDÒüºÒé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîûÒüùõ╗Ñõ©ïÒéÆõ┐«µ¡ú
    * Õêù`Recency`Òü¿ÒüùÒüªÒÇüÒÇîÒé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîûÕëìÒü«InvoiceDateÒü«µ£ÇÕñºÕÇñÒÇìÒüïÒéëInvoiceDateÒü«µ£ÇÕñºÕÇñÒéÆÕ╝òÒüäÒüƒµùÑµò░+1
    * Õêù`Frequency`Òü¿ÒüùÒüªÒÇüInvoiceNoÒü«ÒâªÒâïÒâ╝Òé»µò░
    * Õêù`Monetary`Òü¿ÒüùÒüªÒÇü(Quantity * UnitPrice)Òü«ÕÉêÞ¿ê

3. Õêù`Monetary`ÒüºÚÖìÚáåÒü½ÒÇüÕêù`CustomerID`ÒüºµÿçÚáåÒü½Òé¢Òâ╝Òâê

µ£ÇÕêØÒü«3ÞíîÒüîõ©ïÞ¿ÿÒü«ÒéêÒüåÒü½Òü¬ÒéïÒüôÒü¿ÒÇé

fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)
# 1. ÒâçÒâ╝Òé┐Òé»Òâ¬Òâ╝ÒâïÒâ│Òé░
_tmp = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.to_datetime(format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M"),
).filter(
    pl.col("Quantity") > 0,
    pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0,
    pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null(),
)

# 2. RFMµîçµ¿ÖÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ù
_tmp = (
    _tmp.with_columns(
        Recency=(
            pl.col("InvoiceDate").max() - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().over("CustomerID")
        ).dt.total_days() + 1,
    )
    .group_by("CustomerID")
    .agg(
        pl.col("Recency").first(),
        Frequency=pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique(),
        Monetary=(pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum(),
    )
)

# 3. Õêù`Monetary`ÒüºÚÖìÚáåÒü½ÒÇüÕêù`CustomerID`ÒüºµÿçÚáåÒü½Òé¢Òâ╝Òâê
print(_tmp.sort(["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False]).collect())

_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"

import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)

# µò░ÕÇñÕêùÒü«µè¢Õç║Òü¿Õ╣│ÕØçÞ¿êþ«ù´╝êSexÒüöÒü¿Òü½Òé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîû´╝ë
numeric_cols = [col for col in df_titanic.columns if df_titanic[col].dtype.is_numeric()]
sex_means = (
    df_titanic.group_by("Sex")
    .agg([
        pl.all().exclude("Sex").mean().name.suffix("_Mean")
    ])
)

# ÕàâÒü«ÒâçÒâ╝Òé┐ÒâòÒâ¼Òâ╝ÒâáÒéÆµø┤µû░´╝êÞ¿êþ«ùÒüùÒüƒÕ╣│ÕØçÕÇñÒéÆþÁÉÕÉê´╝ë
# ÔÇ╗ÒüôÒü«µºïµêÉÒüºÒü»ÒÇîµÇºÕêÑÒüöÒü¿Òü«Õ╣│ÕØçÕÇñÒÇìÒéÆµû░ÒüùÒüäÕêùÒü¿ÒüùÒüªÞ┐¢ÕèáÒüÖÒéïÕ¢óÒü½Òü¬ÒéèÒü¥ÒüÖÒÇé
df_titanic = df_titanic.join(sex_means, on="Sex", how="left")

# µ£ÇþÁéþÜäÒü¬Òé¢Òâ╝ÒâêÒü¿Õç║Õèø
result = df_titanic.sort("Sex")
print(result)
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    ((pl.col("DATE").dt.year() - 1) * 12 + pl.col("DATE").dt.month()).alias("year_month_index")
).with_columns(
    (pl.col("SNOW").sum().over(pl.col("year_month_index").map_elements(lambda x: (x // 12) * 12 + (x % 12 + 7)))), # ÒüôÒü«Òâ¡Òé©ÒââÒé»ÒüºÒü»Òü¬ÒüÅÒÇüÕìÿþ┤öÒü¬Õ╣┤Õ║ªÞ¿êþ«ùÒüºÒé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîû
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.year().map_elements(lambda y: (y - 1) * 12 + 6)).alias("TotalSnow") # Þ¬ñÒéèõ┐«µ¡ú
)

# µ¡úÞºúÒü«Òâ¡Òé©ÒââÒé»: 7µ£êÒéÆÞÁÀþé╣Òü¿ÒüÖÒéïÕ╣┤Õ║ªÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ùÒüùÒÇüÒüØÒü«Õ╣┤Õ║ªÒüöÒü¿Òü½SNOWÒéÆÕÉêÞ¿êÒüÖÒéï
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    (((pl.col("DATE").dt.year() - 1) * 12 + pl.col("DATE").dt.month()) // 12).alias("year_group")
).with_columns(
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().over(pl.col("year_group")).alias("TotalSnow")
)

print(df_weather)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

# 7µ£êÒéÆÚûïÕºïþé╣Òü¿ÒüÖÒéïÕ╣┤Õ║ª´╝êSeason´╝ëÒéÆÕ«Üþ¥®
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.month() >= 7)
    .then(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() + 1)
    .otherwise(pl.col("DATE").dt.year())
    .alias("Season")
)

# SeasonÒüöÒü¿Òü½SNOWÒü«ÕÉêÞ¿êÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ùÒüùÒÇüÕàâÒü«ÒâçÒâ╝Òé┐ÒâòÒâ¼Òâ╝ÒâáÒü½þÁÉÕÉê
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().over("Season").alias("TotalSnow")
).drop("Season")

print(df_weather)

).sort("FiscalYear")

    index_column="DATE",
    period="2d",

).agg(pl.col("AvgTMAX").mean())

    pl.col("DATE").dt.date()
)

import polars as pl
from datetime import date

market_prices = pl.DataFrame({
    'time': pl.date_range(pl.date(2023, 1, 2), pl.date(2023, 1, 8), '2d', eager=True),
    'price': range(2, 9, 2),
})

orders = pl.DataFrame({
    'order_time': [date(2023, 1, 1), date(2023, 1, 5), date(2023, 1, 9)],
    'volume': [100, 120, 180],
})

result = orders.join(
    market_prices,
    left_on="order_time",
    right_on="time",
    how="left"
).sort("time").upsample(time_column="time", every="1d").interpolate(method="linear") # This is a placeholder logic for complex join. 

# Correct implementation using join_asof:
result = pl.join_asof(
    orders.sort("order_time"),
    market_prices.sort("time"),
    left_on="order_time",
    right_on="time"
)

print(result)
```

import polars as pl
from datetime import date

market_prices = pl.DataFrame({
    'time': pl.date_range(pl.date(2023, 1, 2), pl.date(2023, 1, 8), '2d', eager=True),
    'price': range(2, 10, 2),
})
orders = pl.DataFrame({
    'order_time': [date(2023, 1, 1), date(2023, 1, 5), date(2023, 1, 9)],
    'volume': [100, 120, 180],
})

result = orders.join_asof(
    market_prices,
    left_on="order_time",
    right_on="time",
    strategy="backward"
)
print(result)

    .with_columns(

    )

)

    .alias("ConditionalCumulativeFare")
).drop("AdjustedFare")

    .otherwise(0)
    .over("Pclass")
    .cum_sum()
    .alias("ConditionalCumulativeFare")
)
print(df_titanic)
```

)

])

).drop("ItemJson")

import polars as pl
_df = pl.DataFrame({"A": [1, 2, 3], "B": [4, 5, 6]})
def _value(row: tuple[int, int]) -> int:
    return row[0] + 2 * row[1]

_df = _df.map_elements(lambda row: _value(row), as_ref=True).select(pl.all().name.suffix("").alias("Val"))
# Or more accurately to the logic requested (applying function and selecting only that result):
_df = pl.DataFrame(
    _df.map_elements(lambda row: _value(row), as_ref=True).select(pl.all().alias("Val"))
)
print(_df)
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.truncate("1mo")).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.truncate("1mo")).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        ((pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= (2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX")))
        .alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)

print(result)
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over("DATE").alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"), # Õ«ƒÚÜøÒü½Òü»µ£êÒüºÒé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîûÒüîÕ┐àÞªü
    ])
    # µ£êÒüöÒü¿Òü«þÁ▒Þ¿êÚçÅÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ùÒüùÒüªþÁÉÕÉê
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").dt.month().alias("month"),
        pl.col("DATE").dt.year().alias("year"),
    )
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(["year", "month"]).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over(["year", "month"]).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= (pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX") * 2)
    ).with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").alias("IsAnomaly") # ÒüôÒüôÒüºõ╗úÕàÑÒüùþø┤ÒüÖÒü«ÒüºÒü»Òü¬ÒüÅÒÇüÕêùÕÉìÒéÆµîçÕ«Ü
    )
)

# õ©èÞ¿ÿÒü«Òâ¡Òé©ÒââÒé»ÒéÆµò┤þÉåÒüùÒüªµ¡úÒüùÒüÅÕ«ƒÞúà
result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over([pl.col("DATE").dt.year(), pl.col("DATE").dt.month()]).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over([pl.col("DATE").dt.year(), pl.col("DATE").dt.month()]).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        ((pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= (pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX") * 2)).alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)

print(result)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").str.to_date("%Y-%m-%d")
    )
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").dt.month().alias("month")
    )
    .group_by("month")
    .agg(
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().alias("MonthlyStdTMAX")
    )
    .join(
        _df.with_columns(pl.col("DATE").dt.month().alias("month")),
        on="month",
        how="left"
    )
    .with_columns(
        (
            (pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() 
            >= (2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX"))
        ).alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .select(
        "DATE", "PRCP", "SNOW", "SNWD", "TMIN", "TMAX", 
        "MonthlyAvgTMAX", "MonthlyStdTMAX", "IsAnomaly"
    )
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)

print(result)

import polars as pl
from datetime import datetime

_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

result = _df.filter(
    (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null())
).with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.to_datetime(format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M")
).collect()

max_date = result["InvoiceDate"].max()

rfm = result.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    (max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1.0,
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique(),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum()
).select(
    pl.col("CustomerID"),
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").map_elements(lambda x: (max_date - x).dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"), # This logic was simplified in the final select for clarity
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
)

# Re-calculating correctly based on requested logic to ensure exact types and columns
rfm = result.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    ((max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1).cast(pl.Float64).alias("Recency"),
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().cast(pl.Int64).alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().cast(pl.Float64).alias("Monetary")
).sort(
    ["Monetary", "CustomerID"], 
    by=["Monetary", "CustomerID"]
)

print(rfm.head(3))
```

ÔÇ╗µ│¿µäÅ´╝ÜµÅÉõ¥øÒüòÒéîÒüƒÞªüõ╗ÂÒéÆµ¡úþó║Òü½ÕÅìµÿáÒüÖÒéïÒüƒÒéüÒÇüÕ×ïÕñëµÅøÒü¿Òé¢Òâ╝ÒâêÒéÆÕÄ│Õ»åÒü½ÞíîÒüåÒé│Òâ╝ÒâëÒüºÒüÖÒÇéÕ«ƒÚÜøÒü«ÒâçÒâ╝Òé┐µºïÚÇáÒü½ÒéêÒéè`Recency`Òü«Þ¿êþ«ùÚâ¿ÕêåÒüîÕïòþÜäÒü½Þ¬┐µò┤ÒüòÒéîÒéïÕá┤ÕÉêÒüîÒüéÒéèÒü¥ÒüÖÒÇé

import polars as pl

_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

df = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.to_datetime(format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M")
).filter(
    (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null())
).collect()

rfm = df.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    (pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().dt.total_days() - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"), # µ│¿: Þªüõ╗ÂÒü«ÒÇîµ£ÇÕñºÕÇñÒüïÒéëµ£ÇÕñºÕÇñÒéÆÕ╝òÒüÅÒÇìÒü½Õƒ║ÒüÑÒüìÞ¿êþ«ù
    # Þªüõ╗ÂÒü«ÒÇîÒé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîûÕëìÒü«InvoiceDateÒü«µ£ÇÕñºÕÇñÒÇìÒéÆÕà¿õ¢ôÒüïÒéëÕÅûÕ¥ùÒüùÒüªÞ¿êþ«ùÒüÖÒéïÕá┤ÕÉê
    (pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().dt.total_days() - df["InvoiceDate"].max().dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"),
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
)

# µ¡úÒüùÒüäRecencyÞ¿êþ«ù´╝êÕà¿õ¢ôÒü«µ£ÇÕñºµùÑ - ÕÉäÚíºÕ«óÒü«µ£ÇÕñºµùÑ + 1´╝ë
max_date = df["InvoiceDate"].max()
rfm = df.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    ((max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"),
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
).sort(["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False])

print(rfm.head(3))

import polars as pl
_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

_df = (
    _df
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.strptime(pl.Date, format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M").alias("InvoiceDate")
    )
    .filter(
        (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) &
        (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) &
        pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null()
    )
)

max_date = _df.select(pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).collect().item()

_rfm = (
    _df
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).alias("TotalPrice")
    )
    .group_by("CustomerID")
    .agg(
        (max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days().alias("Recency"),
        pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
        pl.col("TotalPrice").sum().round(2).alias("Monetary")
    )
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("Recency") + 1).alias("Recency")
    )
    .sort(by=["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False])
)

import polars as pl

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
# ÒâÇÒâƒÒâ╝Òü«Þª│µ©¼Õ£░þé╣ÕêùÒéÆÞ┐¢Õèá
_df = df_weather.with_columns(
    Station=pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() < 1950)
    .then(pl.lit("StationA"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("StationB"))
)

# Õ£░þé╣ÒüöÒü¿ÒÇü10Õ╣┤ÒüöÒü¿Òü½Õ╣│ÕØçµ£ÇÚ½ÿµ░ùµ©®ÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ù
result = (
    _df.with_columns(
        DATE=(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() // 10 * 10)
    )
    .group_by(["Station", "DATE"])
    .agg(
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("AvgTMAX/decade")
    )
    .select(["Station", "DATE", "AvgTMAX/decade"])
    .sort(["Station", "DATE"])
)

print(result)

from datetime import date
import polars as pl

market_prices = pl.DataFrame({
    'time': pl.date_range(pl.date(2023, 1, 2), pl.date(2023, 1, 8), '2d', eager=True),
    'price': range(2, 9, 2),
})
orders = pl.DataFrame({
    'order_time': [date(2023, 1, 1), date(2023, 1, 5), date(2023, 1, 9)],
    'volume': [100, 120, 180],
})

result = orders.join_asof(
    market_prices,
    left_on='order_time',
    right_on='time',
    strategy='backward'
)
print(result)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

df = (
    _df.with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        ((pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= 2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX")).alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)
print(df)

import polars as pl

_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

# 1. ÒâçÒâ╝Òé┐Òé»Òâ¬Òâ╝ÒâïÒâ│Òé░
cleaned_df = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.strptime(pl.Datetime, format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M")
).filter(
    (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) &
    (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) &
    (pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null())
).collect()

# Òé░Òâ½Òâ╝ÒâùÕîûÕëìÒü«InvoiceDateÒü«µ£ÇÕñºÕÇñÒéÆÕÅûÕ¥ù
max_date = cleaned_df["InvoiceDate"].max()

# 2. RFMµîçµ¿ÖÒéÆÞ¿êþ«ù & 3. Òé¢Òâ╝Òâê
rfm_df = (
    cleaned_df.group_by("CustomerID")
    .agg(
        ((pl.lit(max_date) - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"),
        pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
        (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
    )
    .sort(["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False])
)

print(rfm_df)
